title: Termite Treatment in Irvington, NY | $800-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in Irvington, Westchester. Expert termite inspection & elimination for homes and businesses. Licensed technicians. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Protect your Irvington property from destructive termites with Best Pest Control NYC's comprehensive termite treatment services. Our experienced technicians provide thorough inspections and effective treatments for homes and businesses throughout Irvington and Westchester County. Whether you're dealing with an active infestation or need preventative protection, we deliver reliable solutions tailored to your property's needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Irvington residents with state-of-the-art termite detection and treatment methods. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Westchester's historic homes and modern properties, offering customized solutions with guaranteed results and competitive pricing.
localContext: Irvington's beautiful Hudson River location and mix of historic Victorian homes and modern residences create ideal conditions for termite activity, especially in older wooden structures along the waterfront and near the historic districts. From properties near the Scenic Hudson RiverWalk to homes in the tree-lined neighborhoods surrounding Main Street, our team provides specialized termite protection that preserves Irvington's architectural charm.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Irvington typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We offer free inspections and transparent pricing with no hidden fees, providing detailed quotes after assessing your specific situation.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in Irvington homes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows or doors, mud tubes along foundation walls, small piles of wood-colored droppings, and visible damage to wooden structures. Irvington's older homes are particularly susceptible, so annual inspections are recommended, especially for properties with basements or crawl spaces.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Irvington are completed within 4-8 hours for an average-sized home, though extensive infestations may require multiple visits. Treatment methods vary from liquid termiticides to baiting systems, with follow-up inspections scheduled to ensure complete elimination and long-term protection.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite prevention services in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive termite prevention services including soil treatments, monitoring systems, and annual inspections. Given Irvington's proximity to the Hudson River and wooded areas, preventative treatments are especially important for protecting your property investment from future termite damage.
